name: Donny's Creamy No-Fat Cole Slaw
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Kraft Free Brand Nonfat Mayonnaise Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the mayonnaise, vinegar, sugar, celery salt, black pepper, and optional horseradish. Stir together until combined.
2. Toss the cabbage and carrots in another medium-sized bowl until combined.
3. Pour the dressing over the cabbage and carrots, tossing to combine.
4. Serve.
Makes: 4-5 cups, 8-10 servings as a side salad.
